author: DanielOnDiordna
name: Portal History Support for all IITC versions (with cache)
description: With this plugin the Portal History will be implemented into all versions of IITC. This plugin injects functionality from the IITC-CE release (version 0.32.0) plus extra modifications into all IITC versions (IITC.me / IITC-CE 0.31.1). Code will be injected into the IITC core. History results are cached and re-used automatically. Details from your COMMS captured portals are loaded automatically. Temporary disabled for IITC 0.40.0
